calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Lew for Anyu Luan and Mei Yin Luan (Petitioners).

The Court noted that the request for appointment is by one nominated executor along with her Mother who is not nominated, raised the issue of how the order should be worded and the issue of whether or not bond is going to be required. Mr. Lew stated that the main reason for having both parties appointed is to have someone local to handle the day to day business, that it is beneficial for Creditors to have someone local and that he thinks he can get Jennifer Luan to sign a waiver of bond. The Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed is taken under submission until August 9, 2017. If the Court has a waiver by that date, the petition will be granted with a $10,000.00 bond. If the Court does not have a waiver by that date, it will be granted with a bond in the amount $2,376,000.00 to cover all of the assets.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
